opportunities.name: CIP-014 Compliance Wave — Sub-200MW Facilities
opportunities.description: Proposed CIP-014 amendment creates compliance urgency for ~340 facilities under 200MW nationally. Most lack a qualified assessment partner.
opportunities.notes: Apex Power Cooperative is highest-fit unengaged prospect in this wave. Harrow Industrial secondary consideration.

opportunities.name: Regional Manufacturing Safety Consolidation
opportunities.source: Client pattern across eng-002, pipe-003, pipe-005
opportunities.description: Three mid-size manufacturers in overlapping geography face similar OSHA/physical security gaps. Package retainer offering could serve all three efficiently.
opportunities.notes: Shared-service model. Needs pricing structure from Marcus.

opportunities.name: Datacenter Operator Physical Security Gap
opportunities.source: External market research — datacenter construction pipeline
opportunities.description: New datacenter builds (AI/hyperscaler wave) are outpacing physical security assessment capacity. Operators need qualified assessors at design stage, not post-build.
opportunities.notes: This is the long-term growth vector. Agentic infrastructure builds need human-in-the-loop physical security assessment at the design phase. Position Sustainable Gaps as the specialist firm for this niche.

opportunities.name: Post-Incident Recovery Assessment
opportunities.source: Signal sig-004 — ransomware wave + industry incidents
opportunities.description: Organizations recovering from ransomware or physical breach events need a structured post-incident gap assessment. No current service offering covers this.
opportunities.notes: Requires methodology development. Anika to draft scope framework.
